case_title: MOSSER COMPANIES, INC. VS. ANTHONY MENZIES ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER COMPANIES, INC. SERVED SEP-01-2017, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT MENZIES, ANTHONY AN INDIVIDUAL
